creator: gsz@acm.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Kondratyev from comment #54)

Tested it; same thing. I'm afraid I may be doing something wrong:

* I build and install a new kernel
* I build and install usr.sbin/moused
* I copy sys/sys/mouse.h header to include/sys/mouse.h

I set these options on /boot/loader.conf:

hw.psm.elantech_support=1
hw.psm.elantech.two_finger_scroll=1

and I have moused enabled in rc.conf.

To test vscroll, I do:

sysctl hw.psm.elantech.two_finger_scroll=0
sysctl hw.psm.elantech.vscroll_ver_area=-100

and I did also test setting

sysctl hw.psm.elantech.window_min=1

I'm running 11-RC3 btw.
